title: More Nonsense Limerick 100
content:
There was an old man of Thermopylae,
    Who never did anything properly;
    But they said, "If you choose 
    To boil eggs in your shoes,
    You shall never remain in Thermopylae."
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 100"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
